class.name: AutoworkDoubler
class.experimental: Some methods may not be implemented and may be changed in future versions.
class.brief_description: Creates test doubles for scenes and scripts.
class.description:
The AutoworkDoubler is responsible for generating test doubles, such as mocks and stubs, for use in unit tests.
Test doubles allow developers to replace real scenes or scripts with controlled substitutes, making it easier to isolate behavior and simulate specific conditions during testing.

method.name: double_scene
method.description: Creates a test double for the scene at the given [param path].

method.name: double_script
method.description: Creates a test double for the script at the given [param path].

method.name: set_spy
method.description: Sets the [AutoworkSpy] instance used by the doubler.

method.name: set_stubber
method.description: Sets the [AutoworkStubber] instance used by the doubler.
